launch_inputs.documentation_goal: Write review-ready technical documentation for the audit export lifecycle, covering queueing, failure handling, and operator-visible states.
launch_inputs.target_reader: Product engineers and support engineers who need to diagnose export problems quickly.
launch_inputs.source_material_context: Use the host docs portal and uploaded API notes as the source package.

launch_inputs.documentation_goal: Turn the export API notes and workspace docs into a concise implementation-facing guide for job orchestration and failure recovery.
launch_inputs.target_reader: Backend developers responsible for export jobs and the operator surfaces around them.
launch_inputs.source_material_context: Anchor the draft in the uploaded API notes, then reconcile it with the host-directory docs set.

launch_inputs.documentation_goal: Produce a documentation update for the export workflow that can be shared with engineering and support before the next release review.
launch_inputs.source_material_context: Use the existing docs workspace and uploaded API notes as the main source material.

steering_script.message: Shorten the draft and emphasize operator-visible states, troubleshooting, and links between the API and the workflow UI.
